note: Add every completed demo here after it's built. This registry is checked BEFORE building anything new. Matching is semantic — the LLM reads name, description, and demo_type to decide if a solution is reusable. source field: 'manual' = built outside the deploy tool (no URL expected), 'demo_tool' = auto-deployed by deploy.py (Railway URL available).

solutions.name: Voice Agent — Inbound + Outbound
solutions.description: AI voice agent handling inbound customer calls and outbound follow-ups with natural conversation flow. Conducts screening interviews, captures profile information, and routes or follows up automatically.
solutions.note: Demo created on 11labs — no URL needed

solutions.name: SEO + AO Content Generation Tool
solutions.description: AI-powered tool for generating SEO-optimized and audience-optimized marketing content. Takes a topic or product and outputs blog posts, social media copy, and meta descriptions tailored to the target audience.
solutions.note: Marketing team's tool — contact Marketing for demo

solutions.name: Mister Mac — Chat Agent Demo
solutions.description: A real-time AI technical support copilot that listens to customer conversations, watches screen shares via FaceTime SharePlay, and provides step-by-step guidance text to junior technicians during live support calls.
what_to_customize: Must work in real-time during live calls
Speed is critical - can't have delays
May need to run locally on Mac Mini

solutions.name: Construction RFP Automation Platform
solutions.description: AI-powered workflow automation for sending RFP requests to subcontractors, tracking responses, following up on delays, and comparing pricing to historical data. Integrates with Teams-based project management.

solutions.name: Solar Proposal Generator + CRM
solutions.description: AI-powered solar proposal generation using utility data, integrated CRM pipeline, and lead cost analysis for solar installers
